title: Endlock
description: Fabric mod to disable/toggle end dimension
body:
# Endlock

> If you want support for more versions, contact me on Discord: **danyaall**

This mod allows for the End dimension to be toggled/disabled. 

**Fabric API** must already be installed for this to work.

| Command                 | Usage                                             | Requires OP |
|--------------------------|---------------------------------------------------|--------------|
| `/endlock status ` | Used to get status of the End dimension         | Yes      |
| `/endlock toggle`      | Toggles the End dimension to either be accessible or not       | Yes     |

---

**NOTE: This mod may not be actively maintained as this mod was created for a quick resolution for a Minecraft SMP, I will try maintain this with version updates.**
